CREATE TABLE test_identity (id UInt32, value Int32);
SELECT identity(value) FROM test_identity WHERE id = 1;
SELECT identity(value) AS original_value FROM test_identity WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_identity WHERE value > 0);
SELECT identity(value + 10) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_identity);
SELECT identity(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_identity) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id UInt32, reference_value Int32);
SELECT t.id, identity(t.value) AS value_identity, identity(j.reference_value) AS reference_identity FROM test_identity AS t JOIN test_join AS j ON t.id = j.id;
SELECT identity(AVG(value)) FROM test_identity WHERE value < 0;
SELECT identity(COUNT(*)) FROM test_identity WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT identity(x) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value AS x FROM test_identity WHERE id < 3);
WITH identity(25) AS calc_value SELECT identity(calc_value + 5);
SELECT identity(value) FROM test_identity ORDER BY identity(id);
